title: Mission #5 – The Robot-Hand Heist
subtitle: Sparkle Ale, seven months old, first epic heist

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Evening, Nova Tutinia. The neon sign of the pizzeria "Ora arrivo!" blinks between violet and orange.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Saturday. Full house. The smell of melted mozzarella floating between tables like a sacred fog.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Three covers for the Bellow family. Plus a tall high chair, padded with backup napkins. The evening looks calm. It looks.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Favilla, white shirt, black pencil skirt, quilted Chanel bag resting on the chair. Pure elegance tonight.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Mallow has dared a sky-blue polo over jeans. On his feet, high yellow Converse. On the table, of course, the MacBook.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Quick code review… five minutes… I swear…

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Mallow. Bubbà! You promised: a laptop-free evening.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Compiling in the background. I'm here. Mentally I'm here.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: I'm holding the chaos front. As always.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: At the next table, an elegant lady in a cream suit. In front of her, on a wide plate: it ARRIVES. A giant Margherita, steaming, perfect.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: On the high chair, Sparkle Ale (seven months, mandarin-collar shirt, mini jeans, high red Converse) stops breathing for a second. His eyes turn into two full moons.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: PIIIZZA!

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Sweetheart, no. That's the lady's. Ours is coming.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: But Sparkle Ale already has his little hands on the cutlery. Knife. Fork. Spoon. Coffee spoon. Two breadsticks. Even the rolled-up napkin.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: I can hear the sound of the catastrophe but I can't see it yet.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Three seconds. Just three. Favilla turns to fix the Chanel bag on her chair. Mallow replies to a notification. Three seconds.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: "AAAAH! MY PIZZAAA!"

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The lady's plate is EMPTY. A trail of melted mozzarella crosses the tablecloth, climbs over the edge, reaches the high chair.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: And there, Sparkle Ale. Smiling. In his right hand he wields a ROBOT ARM, built in three flat seconds: knife, fork, spoon, two breadsticks, a knotted napkin. At its tip, in perfect balance, the stolen Margherita.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: MIIINE! YUM!

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: My son. Seven months old. He just committed the first armed robbery of Nova Tutinia. Bubbà.

choice.prompt: The pizza sits on top of the robot arm. Ale's mouth is already open. Who steps in?

options.label: 🔥 Favilla Blaze – freeze time before the bite
options.hint: Lightning transformation, surgical magic, pizza returned untouched

options.label: 💻 Mallow – hack the robot arm with the MacBook
options.hint: Silent exploit, pizza back on the lady's plate, nobody notices (except Ale)

options.label: 🔧 Let the prototype collapse on its own
options.hint: Math error: Ale is 7 months old, can't count yet. Cutlery hits the floor

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: The pizza is moving toward Ale's mouth. Less than two seconds left. Bubbà! It's on me.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Favilla springs up. The white shirt glows from within, the pencil skirt becomes a violet cape, the Chanel bag floats mid-air in a golden energy field.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla_blaze
text_blocks.text: Stellar Pizzaiola Mode: ACTIVATED.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: For the room, time stops. Forks suspended. Glasses mid-sip. Ale's pizza frozen one centimeter from his freshly grown milk teeth.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Favilla Blaze walks slowly between the frozen tables. She lifts the pizza off the robot arm with the delicacy of a surgeon. A trail of violet sparks accompanies her to the lady's plate.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: POOF. The Margherita lands steaming on the plate, the three olives recomposed in a heart shape. The lady's napkin neatly folded. Glass intact.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla_blaze
text_blocks.text: Crisis averted in 1.7 seconds. Pizza saved, dignity intact, my son's tiny teeth: heist-negative.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Time resumes. The lady sees the pizza still there, whole. She breathes a sigh of relief. She didn't notice anything. Mallow looks up from the MacBook for a second and gives a sly half-smile: he saw it all.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: My partner… officially faster than any hot reload. Confirmed.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Mommy SUPER! AGAIN!

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Mallow. MALLOW. Your son just robbed the next table. Fix it without anyone noticing.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Mallow doesn't close the MacBook: he tilts it toward the high chair. His fingers fire up at mechanical-keyboard speed.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: …wait… the arm is on Bluetooth Low Energy, MAC address something like "AL:E0:07:M0"… ssh-tunnel through the spoon, payload on the fork… ok, I'm in.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: On the screen: green terminal, lines scrolling, ASCII art of a pizza. Nobody in the room notices. Nobody except Ale, whose eyes go wide: dad is hacking his toy. NOT. ALLOWED.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The robot arm moves on its own, gently, as if obeying a different master. It reverses course, crosses the boundary between the two tables, lays the pizza down at the center of the lady's plate. Three olives rearranged into a smiley face. Napkin re-folded.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The lady turns around an instant later. She sees her pizza in its rightful place. She rubs her temples. She thinks she got distracted. She goes back to eating.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: …rollback complete… logs cleaned… no crash… ehm… mission accomplished, ladies and gentlemen.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: DADDY… NO! PIIIZZA MINE! REVENGEEE!

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Hacker husband, seven-month-old son swearing technological revenge. I can call dinner a success. For now.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Mallow… tomorrow you buy him a real cutlery set. All titanium. You earned it.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Wait. Wait wait wait. That arm is shaking. Bubbà! It's shaking BAD.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Sparkle Ale, seven months old, can do many things. He can throw olives, he can say MOZZAA, he can build cutlery robot arms. There is one thing he can't do yet: count.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Maximum payload of the arm: three pieces of cutlery. Actual payload: five pieces of cutlery, two breadsticks, a knotted napkin, and a giant Margherita. Math error: catastrophic.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: One… TWO… seventyyy…

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The prototype gives up. The spoon-elbow bends backwards. The fork-thumb pops off. The breadsticks snap into three pieces. The knotted napkin flies away like a tiny parachute.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Cutlery hits the floor, ting-ting-ting-CLANG. The Margherita does an acrobatic flip and lands exactly on the lady's plate, upside down. Mozzarella up. Tomato down. The three olives slip out and stop right on Ale's red Converse.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: …OOOPS.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Translated into tech language: stack overflow due to design overload. Hardware crash. But… the payload reached its destination, eh?

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The lady in the cream suit stares at her upside-down pizza. Then she stares at Ale. Then at his red Converse decorated with olives. She bursts out laughing, loud. Laughs for three solid minutes.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Sweetheart of mine. Next time you learn to count first, then you build robots. Bubbà. Promise?

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Tables joined. The lady in the cream suit, Favilla, Mallow and Sparkle Ale at the center, all on one single table. The room standing, applauding like it's the end of a concert.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The pizzaiolo walks out of the kitchen, sets a special pizza in the center: "Margherita Sparkle", written in basil. Heart-shaped. Three olives crowning it.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: I'll add it to the menu tomorrow. Already ordering four for delivery next week, from the MacBook…

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Mallow. Bubbà! Close that laptop and eat. Your son is the youngest criminal mastermind of Nova Tutinia, let's celebrate.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: MOZZAAA!

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Maybe we don't save the world tonight. But a pizzeria, a lady and a heart: yes. Mission accomplished.
